div.p: context_switch(old_pcb, new_pcb) — saves current state, loads next process

text.tspan: ; Set kernel stack for ring transitions
; Now user→kernel traps use new process's stack
; Set kernel stack for ring transitions
; Now user→kernel traps use new process's stack
; Process has no idea it was ever paused!
; Process has no idea it was ever paused!

div.p: The ret instruction does NOT return to the caller — it jumps to new_pcb.eip because we switched esp to point at the saved EIP in the new process's stack frame.
